tab.title: Catalog version validation and publishing
tab.description: After a catalog is published, subsequent changes require another validation and a new version.

emptyState.adminPreValidate: Run validation to see errors, warnings, and publish readiness.
emptyState.operator: Operators can monitor the published version and scale sync status. Publishing is admin-only.

history.heading: Version history
history.description: Published versions include the number, publication date, author, and bundle checksum.

errors.csrf: Could not prepare the secured form. Try again.
errors.notReady: Run validation and fix the blocking errors before publishing.
